<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\Attributes; use Attribute; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ #[Attribute(Attribute::TARGET_CLASS | Attribute::TARGET_METHOD | Attribute::IS_REPEATABLE)] final readonly class RequiresEnvironmentVariable { private string $environmentVariableName; private null|string $value; public function __construct(string $environmentVariableName, null|string $value = null) { $this->environmentVariableName = $environmentVariableName; $this->value = $value; } public function environmentVariableName(): string { return $this->environmentVariableName; } public function value(): null|string { return $this->value; } }
